def: Wrong acceptation; understanding in a wrong sense.
Any theory which conceives chance as an objective reality;esp., a theory of evolution which considers that variation may bepurely fortuitous.

Of or pertaining to the thorax, or chest. Thoracic duct(Anat.), the great trunk of the lymphatic vessels, situated on theventral side of the vertebral column in the thorax and abdomen. SeeIllust. of Lacteal.
To reduce to a code, as laws.
Winding; twisted; warped; -- applied to curves and surfaces.
Of, pertaining to, or resembling, a natural order of tropicaltrees and shrubs (Malpighiaceæ), some of them climbing plants, andtheir stems forming many of the curious lianes of South Americanforests.
A species of large tupelo (Nyssa aquatica) growing in swamps inthe southern of the United States. See Ogeechee lime.
Inoculation of a person with virus from his own body.
A young lady of superior beauty and attractions; a handsomelady, or one who attracts notice in society; a fair lady.
A power, attributed to some persons while in a mesmeric state,of discering objects not perceptible by the senses in their normalcondition.
Stridulous; able to stridulate; used in stridulating; adaptedfor stridulation. Darwin.
The forearm; the ulna, a bone of the arm extending from elbowto wrist. [Obs.]
